历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 10209, shifted to 12213 in 2024 (a backward shift of about 2004 places), and rebounded to 10265 in 2025, with significant fluctuations over the past three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 10265. The university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 134 in 2023, 133 in 2024, 109 in 2025, and increased to 129 in 2026, an expansion of about 18.3% compared to 2025, which has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management (25 incidents, 2 negative). Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.2 million, indicating high exposure on short video platforms and moderate to high application attention. No recent enrollment gaps. Psychology (A), Education (A), and Marxist Theory (A-), with 3 A- or above disciplines, highlighting distinctive features in teacher training and agriculture, which have a certain appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular socially, matching the university's engineering offerings. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 is about 238,000 (a significant increase of about 211% from approximately 76,500 in 2025), with an estimated 163,000 science candidates based on historical proportions, leading to a sharp increase in competition. Southwest University is located in Chongqing (a municipality directly under the central government), which is an inter-provincial enrollment for Xinjiang candidates. In recent years, the university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang has been about 1.5% (9 out of 598 nationwide in 2025), with a small enrollment scale, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10265, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 18.3% (alleviating competition), the significant increase of about 211% in Xinjiang candidate numbers (intensifying competition), and the steady rise in university ranking (enhancing appeal), the expansion and candidate surge offset each other, but the candidate growth far exceeds the expansion rate, leading to overall intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 11595, with a range of 11095–12095.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11095–12095, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 11000), focus on competitive engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If the ranking is near the upper limit (about 12000), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors while considering Tier 2 moderate majors. Majors at the Rongchang Campus typically have lower admission rankings and can be a stable choice.
